_comment: Drop this into the project's .mcp.json (shared via git), or merge under the same mcpServers key in ~/.claude.json for a user-wide install. Primary analyzer config lives in .vscode/settings.json (al.codeAnalyzers, al.ruleSetPath). AL_EXTRA_CODE_ANALYZERS and AL_EXTRA_RULESETS are optional and stack ON TOP of those — use them to force-enable a custom linter (with its quickfixes) or an extra ruleset regardless of what VS Code has configured. Both are ;-delimited and support the same ${analyzerFolder}/${workspaceFolder}/etc. placeholders as settings.json.
